Our Story

About Alpha Waakye

At Alpha Waakye, we believe every day should start with satisfaction. We are committed to giving you the perfect start to your day with rich, flavorful, and perfectly prepared waakye.

Our meals are crafted with care — from perfectly cooked rice and beans to delicious shito, tender meats, fresh gari, and all your favourite sides. Every plate delivers consistency, taste, and value.

“It's not just food — it's an experience.”

🌾
Authentic Recipes
Traditional Ghanaian waakye made the right way, every single time.
🎉
Bulk & Event Catering
Office lunches, weddings, funerals — we've got you covered.
⚡
Fast & Friendly
Quick, warm service that makes every customer feel valued.
